characters.name: Matthew Adams
characters.description: Matthew AdamsD     E     C     E     A     S     E     DFull NameMatthew AdamsAdditional InformationGenderMaleAge20Date of Birthc. 1958Date of DeathDecember 11, 1978StatusDeceasedFamily / RelativesFatherStewart AdamsMotherMrs. Adams(deceased)Sister(s)Beth AdamsShow InformationPortrayed by(past)Bug HallFirst AppearanceBlank GenerationMatthew Adamswas a member of a cult. He tried to get out of the cult when he learned that one of the leaders was planning a mass suicide. He was then poisoned to death by his girlfriend,Alison Rayand fellow cult member on the leader,Maurice Warfield’s orders.

characters.name: Bernie
characters.description: BernieNameBernieStatusAliveActorMichael Ray EscamillaAppearanceShattered Berniewas the partner of drug dealerCliff Harper. He would be part of the brutal attack on Cliff's girlfriend,Christina Rushwho was then kidnapped by the two and was forced to be part of their drug dealing business. DetectiveLilly Rush, Christina's older sister, and her partner, DetectiveScotty Valens, one of Christina’s many former romances, would take down Bernie by ambushing him in his home in Philadelphia. After Bernie gave the two detectives information about Christina's and Cliff's whereabouts, Bernie was then handcuffed and was locked inside a closet.

characters.name: Abby Bradford
characters.description: Abby Bradford20071999Full NameAbby BradfordAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge169/10 (1999)Date of BirthNovember 17, 1989StatusAliveFamily / RelativesFatherMr. Bradford (deceased)MotherMarlene Bradford(deceased)Sister(s)Natalie BradfordRelativesUnnamed adoptive familyShow InformationPortrayed by(present)Jennifer Lawrence(2007)Portrayed by(past)Darcy Rose Byrnes(1999)EpisodeA Dollar, A Dream Abby Bradfordwas the younger daughter ofMarlene Bradfordand the sister ofNatalie Bradfordfrom the 18th case of thefourth season, "A Dollar, A Dream". Abby was a kind, cheerful, and somewhat innocent little girl who already understood her family's current situation ever since they lost everything they owned after her father died of cancer. She was supposedly celebrating her 10th birthday when her mother disappeared that day, nowhere to be found. After that incident, Abby and her older sister, Natalie, were sent into foster care. Abby was luckily adopted by a caring foster family, but Natalie was not. As a result, they were separated and grew apart.

characters.description: Abby Bradford20071999Full NameAbby BradfordAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge169/10 (1999)Date of BirthNovember 17, 1989StatusAliveFamily / RelativesFatherMr. Bradford (deceased)MotherMarlene Bradford(deceased)Sister(s)Natalie BradfordRelativesUnnamed adoptive familyShow InformationPortrayed by(present)Jennifer Lawrence(2007)Portrayed by(past)Darcy Rose Byrnes(1999)EpisodeA Dollar, A Dream Abby Bradfordwas the younger daughter ofMarlene Bradfordand the sister ofNatalie Bradfordfrom the 18th case of thefourth season, "A Dollar, A Dream". characters.name: Marlene Bradford
characters.description: Marlene BradfordD     E     C     E     A     S     E     DFull NameMarlene BradfordAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge35Date of Birth1964Date of DeathNovember 17, 1999StatusDeceased (Gunshot to the chest)Family / RelativesSpouseMr. Bradford (deceased)DaughterAbby BradfordNatalie BradfordShow InformationPortrayed by(past)Paula MalcomsonEpisodeA Dollar, A Dream Marlene Bradfordwas a 35-year-old widower who recently became homeless, and the main victim in the 18th case of the4th season, "A Dollar, A Dream". Marlene was once a housewife living a comfortable suburban life until her husband died of cancer in 1999. All of their savings were wiped out because of the medical bills and the death of the family's breadwinner. Marlene was forced to live in a car with her two daughters,Natalie(the eldest) andAbby Bradford(the youngest), for three months after they lost their home as well.

characters.name: Marlene Bradford
characters.description: Marlene BradfordD     E     C     E     A     S     E     DFull NameMarlene BradfordAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge35Date of Birth1964Date of DeathNovember 17, 1999StatusDeceased (Gunshot to the chest)Family / RelativesSpouseMr. Bradford (deceased)DaughterAbby BradfordNatalie BradfordShow InformationPortrayed by(past)Paula MalcomsonEpisodeA Dollar, A Dream Marlene Bradfordwas a 35-year-old widower who recently became homeless, and the main victim in the 18th case of the4th season, "A Dollar, A Dream". Marlene was once a housewife living a comfortable suburban life until her husband died of cancer in 1999. All of their savings were wiped out because of the medical bills and the death of the family's breadwinner. Marlene was forced to live in a car with her two daughters,Natalie(the eldest) andAbby Bradford(the youngest), for three months after they lost their home as well.

characters.name: Natalie Bradford
characters.description: Natalie Bradford20071999Full NameNatalie BradfordAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge2114 (1999)Date of Birth1985StatusAliveFamily / RelativesFatherMr. Bradford (deceased)MotherMarlene Bradford(deceased)Sister(s)Abby Bradford(young sister)Show InformationPortrayed by(present)Melinda Dahl(2007)Portrayed by(past)Channing Nichols(1999)EpisodeA Dollar, A Dream Natalie Bradfordis the elder daughter of the murder victimMarlene Bradfordand the older sister ofAbby Bradfordin the episode "A Dollar, A Dream". Natalie was a bitter, self-centered girl who believed that her mother left her and her sister, disregarding her duties for them. She had a difficult relationship with Marlene after her father died and they lost everything they owned. However, Natalie shows that she still loved her mother despite their misunderstandings.

characters.name: Natalie Bradford
characters.description: Natalie Bradford20071999Full NameNatalie BradfordAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge2114 (1999)Date of Birth1985StatusAliveFamily / RelativesFatherMr. Bradford (deceased)MotherMarlene Bradford(deceased)Sister(s)Abby Bradford(young sister)Show InformationPortrayed by(present)Melinda Dahl(2007)Portrayed by(past)Channing Nichols(1999)EpisodeA Dollar, A Dream Natalie Bradfordis the elder daughter of the murder victimMarlene Bradfordand the older sister ofAbby Bradfordin the episode "A Dollar, A Dream". characters.name: Vita Chacon
characters.description: Vita Chacon20071999Full NameVita ChaconAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge2720 (1999)Date of Birth1979StatusAliveShow InformationPortrayed by(present)Gloria Garayua(both 1999 & 2007)EpisodeA Dollar, A Dream Vita Chaconis a character in "A Dollar, A Dream". Back in 1999, she was homeless but 7 years later, Vita finally had a good job at the Blue Mart as a saleslady. Vita first metMarlene Bradfordandherdaughtersin a temporary shelter for homeless people where at first, Vita acquired bed #22, which was meant for the Bradfords. Because of this, Vita reached an argument with Marlene, stating that she was the first person who got the bed, even teasing Marlene's daughters, but the shelter committee scolded her. She told Vita that "mothers with daughters get the last bed". Vita had no choice but to give up the bed and threatened Marlene that if she encountered her again, she would kick her (censored words).

characters.name: Vita Chacon

characters.name: Celeste Cooper
characters.description: Celeste CooperAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge50Date of BirthMay 16, 1959StatusAliveFamily / RelativesSpousePaul CooperChildrenLilly RushandChristina Rush(stepdaughters)DaughterMaggie CooperSonFinn CooperShow InformationPortrayed by(present)Mare WinninghamEpisodeThe Good Soldier Celeste Cooper(born May 16, 1959), was the second wife ofPaul Cooperand mother of his two younger children,MaggieandFinn Cooper. She later become the stepmother ofLilly RushandChristina Rush, after theirbiological motherpassed away, and upon meeting them for the first time around 2010. Celeste is a loving and kind-hearted mother to Maggie and Finn, but sometimes gently strict with regards to family relations (as she personally really hating having a secret agenda and family avoidance between her husband and his daughters from his first marriage). She is very supportive and welcoming to Paul's first family, as Celeste was only caring for the well-being of everyone and not letting Lilly and Christina feel being left out, even if she wasn't completely related to them. She often holding up a family dinner to their home.

characters.name: Frank DiCenzio
characters.description: Frank DiCenzioD     E     C     E     A     S     E     DFull NameFrank DiCenzioAdditional InformationGenderMaleAge49Date of Birth1952Date of DeathDecember 11, 2001StatusDeceased (Blunt Force Trauma)Family / RelativesSpouseLydia DiCenzio (deceased)SonTommy DiCenzioShow InformationPortrayed by(past)James DiStefanoEpisodeFrank's Best Frank DiCenziowas a widowed father and owner of Frank's Best, a deli in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, specifically in an area called Oxford Circle. He would be sadly murdered by his own son,Tommyduring an argument brought forth by Tommy’s anger over his father’s lack of spending time with him and hatred towards Tommy's best friend, the troubled, thuggishNick "Stump" Fanelli, among other things. But the biggest issue was his resentment towardsRicardo Muñoz, one of his dad’s employees who was the one in terms of “taking Frank” away from Tommy, but of course, he was unknowingly doing it. The two men just become close because of Ricardo‘s troubled life: he was an immigrant, living alone in the states as he came from El Salvador and his family was still there. And him being threatened by the violent businessmanFelix Darosa. His cause of death was being beaten to death when Tommy would struck him with his hockey stick repeatedly when Frank tried to get his son help.

characters.name: Tommy DiCenzio
characters.description: Tommy DiCenzio20052001Full NameTommy DiCenzioAdditional InformationGenderMaleAge21 (2005)17 (2001)Date of Birth1984StatusArrestedFamily / RelativesFatherFrank DiCenzio(deceased)MotherLydia DiCenzio (deceased)Show InformationPortrayed by(present)Tommy Savas (both 2001 & 2005)EpisodeFrank's Best Tommy DiCenziowas the son and killer ofFrank DiCenzioin "Frank's Best". Tommy's life changed in 2000 when his mother Lydia died of unknown causes. He had a close relationship with her and developed anger issues after his mother's death, with a frightening temper. Frank changed and wouldn't spend as much time with Tommy due to working at the family business, a deli.

characters.name: Caroline Dratton
characters.description: Caroline Dratton200719981985Full NameCaroline DrattonAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge4839 (1998)26 (1985)Date of Birth1960StatusAliveFamily / RelativesSpouseJay Dratton(deceased)SonTommy DrattonRelativesUnnamed grandsonShow InformationPortrayed by(present)Lynda Boyd(all time spans)EpisodeThe Good Death Caroline DrattonwasJay Dratton's wife andTommy Dratton's mother in the 23rd case of thefourth season, "The Good Death". By 1998, her and Jay's marriage was loveless as he had become a cutthroat businessman with an empire to run. These plans became shelved when Jay was diagnosed as having a malignant brain tumor. During his stay in the hospital, Jay had hallucinations of a vacation he took with his family to the beach staying at Motel Louise in 1985.

characters.name: Jay Dratton
characters.description: Jay DrattonD     E     C     E     A     S     E     D19981985Full NameJayson DrattonAdditional InformationGenderMaleAge4027 (1985)Date of Birth1958Date of DeathJune 28, 1998StatusAliveFamily / RelativesSpouseCaroline DrattonSonTommy DrattonRelativesUnnamed Tommy's son (grandson)Phil Wingeter(former business partner/ex-friend)Amelia Flores(acquainted once)Harvey Sawyer(ex-boss, rival)Show InformationPortrayed by(past)Anthony Starke(all time spans)EpisodeThe Good Death Jay Drattonis the main victim from the 23rd case of thefourth season, "The Good Death". He was a successful businessman in 1998 until he was diagnosed with brain tumor and became terminally ill. While he was still suffering and grappling with his illness, he encountered many people during his sufferings, and giving them a bad treatment, including firingHarvey Sawyer, having an argument with his own wife,Caroline Dratton; disowning his son,Tommy Dratton; arguing verbally withAmelia Flores, and even suspecting his own friend and former business partner;Phil Wingeter.

characters.name: Finn Cooper
characters.description: Finn CooperAliasesSean Thomason(fake identity)Additional InformationGenderMaleAge17Date of BirthMarch 16, 1992StatusAliveFamily / RelativesFatherPaul CooperMotherCeleste CooperSister(s)Maggie CooperLilly Rush(paternal half-sister)Christina Rush(paternal half-sister)Show InformationPortrayed by(present)Brett DavernFirst AppearanceSoulLast AppearanceThe Good Soldier Finn Cooper(aliasSean Thomason; born March 16, 1992) is the son ofPaulandCeleste Cooper, younger brother ofMaggie Cooper, and paternal half-brother ofLillyandChristina Rush. For a 17-year-old, Finn behaved like an immature child sometimes. He developed a drinking and gambling habit whenever he had a minor problem, yet would give a hard time to his dad to track him down and try to clean his own mess. Upon meeting Lilly in late 2009, Finn aspired to become a cop like his half-sister, much to her support, but contrary to their father.

characters.name: Curt Fitzpatrick
characters.description: Curt FitzpatrickD     E     C     E     A     S     E     DAdditional InformationGenderMaleAge21Date of Birth1978Date of DeathDecember 26, 1999StatusDeceasedShow InformationPortrayed by(past)Ryan KelleyEpisodeSabotage Curt Fitzpatrickwas the first victim of serial bomberAlessandro Rossilini. When Curt told Rossilini that a shower radio was a disposable piece of crap, Rossilini planted a bomb in the cart full of returns Curt was pushing. The bomb detonated, killing Curt instantly. His ghost image was seen by the killer himself, Alessandro, upon arrested.

characters.name: Anna Gunden
characters.description: Anna GundenD     E     C     E     A     S     E     DAdditional InformationGenderFemaleAge16Date of BirthJuly 21, 1990Date of DeathAugust 20/21, 2006StatusDeceasedFamily / RelativesMotherMiriam GundenBrother(s)Unnamed 2 litle brothersSister(s)Sarah GundenUnnamed 2 teenage and 2 little sistersShow InformationPortrayed by(past)Mackenzie MauzyEpisodeRunning Around Anna Gundenis a 16-year-old Amish girl who was accidentally murdered during her Rumspringa byJakob Beachyin the episodeRunning Around. Anna grew up on an Amish settlement in Lancaster with her mother,Miriam, and younger sister,Sarah. On her 16th birthday, she went on Rumspringa with her friendRachel Wagler, excited to experience life in the urbanized world.

characters.name: Clayton Hathaway
characters.description: Clayton HathawayD     E     C     E     A     S     E     DFull NameClayton HathawayAliasesClayAdditional InformationGenderMaleAge6Date of Birthc. 1981Date of DeathMay 10, 1987StatusDeceasedFamily / RelativesFatherMitch HathawayMotherTara HathawayShow InformationPortrayed by(past)Gattlin GriffithEpisodeOffender Clayton "Clay" Hathawaywas the main victim in the episode "Offender". He was a six-year-old boy and the only child ofTaraandMitch Hathawaywho was found dead in an empty lot in May 1987, with signs of being raped after a semen was found in his body according to the autopsy. Clay was last seen by his parents riding his bike in their neighborhood in May 1987. After being bullied and having his bike stolen byDamon Childress, he tried to get help and was lured into the garage of his neighbor and best friendJohnny Burrell's father,Cliff Burrell. Cliff had pedophilic urges towards his son but never touched Johnny once, leading him to target Clay by raping and then strangling him to death. Clay's body was dumped at a construction site, leading to his father Mitch being framed and wrongfully arrested for the heinous crime.

characters.name: Clayton Hathaway

characters.name: Philip Hill
characters.description: Philip HillNamePhilip HillOccupationBusinessmanFamilyDawn Hill(step-daughter)PathologyPedophileStatusImprisonedActorWesley ThompsonAppearanceDetention Philip "Phil" HillisDawn Hill's sexually abusive stepfather. In 1994, Phil sexually abused his stepdaughter, which led Dawn to not have boyfriends and only focus on her education until she metTrevor Dawson.Boris Litvack,Raquel Montero, and Trevor were also not strangers to each other and in fact made a suicide pact, but Dawn's ordeal changed this into a murder pact. Their victim was Philip and they got themselves put in detention so they would have an alibi. The girls chickened out, however, leaving the boys to confront Philip with a gun.

characters.name: James Hoffman
characters.description: James HoffmanD     E     C     E     A     S     E     DJames in 2006AliasesBuck(byCole Palmer)Additional InformationGenderMaleAge17Date of Birth1989Date of DeathFebruary 19, 2006StatusDeceasedFamily / RelativesFatherDarren HoffmanMotherUnnamed motherSister(s)Alexa HoffmanShow InformationPortrayed by(past)Marshall AllmanEpisodeKnuckle Up James Hoffmanwas a sweet and smart 17-year-old boy whose family and life meant the world to him. But the growing strains between him and his father,Darren, was so hard and frustrating for him, so he would join a fight club, started secretly by some of his fellow classmates at Hanford High School. This a very out-of-character thing for some of the members (all male), including James. But one teenage boy,Cole "Ares" Palmer, was a champion of the "sport" and really enjoyed it; he was also the leader of the club. Also, another teenage boy,Tanner Lennox, was also very good at it and joined for the same reason like James: to vent out his frustrations, caused by his family (specifically his father). Well, tragically, James wouldn't live long to mend things with his father and graduate from school next year (he was a junior). He was brutally beaten to death byArthur Lennox, Tanner’s father, after he refused to give in to be silent after witnessing his son brutally attackMartin Jacobson, who would later die of his injuries.

He was brutally beaten to death byArthur Lennox, Tanner’s father, after he refused to give in to be silent after witnessing his son brutally attackMartin Jacobson, who would later die of his injuries.

characters.name: Vincent Hopper
characters.description: Vincent Hopper20071999Full NameVincent HopperAdditional InformationGenderMaleAge5851 (1999)Date of Birth1948StatusArrestedFamily / RelativesSpouseMrs. HopperSonUnnamed sonShow InformationPortrayed by(present)Holmes Osborne(both 1999 & 2007)EpisodeA Dollar, A Dream Vincent Hopperis a 58-year-old homeless man who was the killer ofMarlene Bradfordin the 18th case of the4th season, "A Dollar, A Dream". Vincent was homeless for 11 years. His mental state had also deteriorated somewhat, as he still hoped to reunite with his wife and son even though his "boy" was now an adult.

characters.name: Will Jeffries
characters.description: Will JeffriesFull NameWilliam JeffriesAliasesWilliam "Disco" Jeffries(byDet. Vera/Disco Inferno)Additional InformationGenderMaleAge58-65Date of BirthApril 30, 1945StatusAliveFamily / RelativesSpouseMary Jeffries(deceased)Show InformationPortrayed by(present)Thom BarryPortrayed by(past)DJ Wyatt  (12 yrs. old, "Strange Fruit")Lawrence Adimora (teen, "Officer Down")First AppearanceLook AgainLast AppearanceShatteredWilliam "Will" Jeffrieswas a veteran police officer and the most senior detective in the Philadelphia Police Department's Homicide unit. Jeffries' childhood home life was suggested to be an abusive one. At 16, he was caught stealing by store ownerHenry "Pops" Walters, who put him to work in his store as penance. Pops would help Jeffries put his life on a better track. Jeffries was a talented football player until he injured his knee senior year, putting an end to any hope of playing professionally. On November 22, 1963, Jeffries was playing touch football at recess when he found out President John F. Kennedy had been assassinated.

characters.name: Nathan Kravet
characters.description: Nathan Kravet20091988Nickname(s)AbbyAdditional InformationGenderMaleAge4929 (1988)StatusArrestedShow InformationPortrayed by(present)John Cirigliano(2009)Portrayed by(past)David Eigenberg(1988)EpisodeBreaking News Nathan Kravetis a producer, Jane's mentor, and her killer from thesixth seasonof the case "Breaking News". He metJane Everettwhile she was still in Syracuse University. Discovering her potential, he became Jane's mentor and helped her get a job at WCNU-7 where she became co-anchor.

characters.name: Seth Lundgren
characters.description: Seth LungdrenD     E     C     E     A     S     E     D20081969Additional InformationGenderMaleAge5112 (1969)Date of Birth1957Date of DeathNovember 9, 2008StatusDeceased (Suicide)Show InformationPortrayed by(present)Richard Edson(2008)Portrayed by(past)Braeden LeMasters(1969)EpisodeOne Small Step Seth Lundgrenwas one ofDanny Finch's friends and always hung out with him,Bobby Kent, andChuck Pierce. During the Moon Landing in 1969, Danny died in mysterious circumstances but his death remained a cold case until 2008 when a toy rocket belonging to Danny was found, prompting the case to be reopened. In 2008, Seth, who had since become a recluse and diagnosed withschizoaffective disorder, was brought in for questioning in regards to Danny's death after it's revealed he was the one who sent the rocket to the police. While left unattended in one of the interrogation rooms, Seth, still left reeling from the events that occurred in 1969 and presumably unable to cope anymore, hung himself with his belt.

characters.name: Anil Patel
characters.description: Anil Patel20071999Full NameAnil PatelAdditional InformationGenderMaleAgearound 30'sStatusAliveShow InformationPortrayed by(present)Faran Tahir(both 1999 & 2007)EpisodeA Dollar, A Dream Anil Patelis murder victimMarlene Bradford's former boss and angel-in-disguise in the episode "A Dollar, A Dream". He is currently working at KFC , after he lost his own grocery business (Alsville Supermarket) in 1999. Despite of this, Anil continued his undercover charity work to the homeless. Anil was running his own grocery store named Alsville Supermarket back in 1999. He hired Marlene since she was looking for a job that could provide for her and hertwodaughters' needs ever since they lost her husband and everything they owned. He was last seen byVita Chaconarguing with Marlene because of a parking incident, as she parked her car in the customers lot.

characters.name: Paul Cooper
characters.description: Paul CooperAdditional InformationGenderMaleAge64Date of BirthAugust 10, 1944StatusAliveFamily / RelativesSpouseEllen Rush(divorced)Celeste CooperDaughterLilly RushChristina RushMaggie CooperSonFinn CooperShow InformationPortrayed by(present)Raymond J. Barry(2008)Portrayed by(past)Brant Cotton (1976)First AppearanceWingsLast AppearanceAlmost Paradise Paul Cooperwas the father ofLillyandChristina Rushby his first wife,Ellen Rush, and ofMaggieandFinn Cooperby his second wife,Celeste Cooperin theseries. He first appeared in a flashback onInto the Blue, then his present appearance onWings. Paul and Ellen divorced around 1976, and he did not see his two elder daughters again for over three decades, until Lilly tracked him down in late 2008. Paul would reconnect with Christina in the spring of 2010.

characters.name: Lilly Rush
characters.description: Lilly RushPhoto #1Photo #2Full NameLillian RushAdditional InformationGenderFemaleDate of BirthJanuary 28, 1969StatusAliveFamily / RelativesFatherPaul CooperMotherEllen Rush(biological ; deceased)Celeste Cooper(stepmother)Brother(s)Finn Cooper(half)Sister(s)Christina Rush(full)Maggie Cooper(half)Show InformationPortrayed by(present)Kathryn MorrisPortrayed by(past)Makenna Barrett (6 yrs. old, "Libertyville", "Into The Blue")Harley Graham (9 yrs. old, "Shattered")Megan Helin (8-10 yrs. old, "Into The Blue", "Dead Heat" )Christina Cellner (10 yrs. old, "The Woods")Madison Meyer (young, "The Good Death")Stephanie Pearson (teen, "Maternal Instincts")Carola Vásquez (Latin-American Spanish dub)First AppearanceLook AgainLast AppearanceShatteredLillian "Lilly" Rush(born January 28, 1969) is the main character on the show. She is portrayed byKathryn Morris Lilly was the only female homicide detective inPhiladelphia, until the later arrival ofLennie Desalle, thenJosie Sutton, and finallyKat Miller. She specialized in working cold cases alongside her partner,Scotty Valens. According to Lilly,"People shouldn't be forgotten, even if they're my kind of people. Maybe, they don't have a lot of money, they don't have lawyers, but they matter." Shortly after Lilly's change from on-the-line jobs to cold cases, her partner,Chris Lassing, transfers out because of his diabetic condition, leading toScotty Valensbeing promoted to homicide and becoming Lilly's partner.

characters.name: Lilly Rush

She is portrayed byKathryn Morris Lilly was the only female homicide detective inPhiladelphia, until the later arrival ofLennie Desalle, thenJosie Sutton, and finallyKat Miller. She specialized in working cold cases alongside her partner,Scotty Valens. According to Lilly,"People shouldn't be forgotten, even if they're my kind of people. Maybe, they don't have a lot of money, they don't have lawyers, but they matter." Shortly after Lilly's change from on-the-line jobs to cold cases, her partner,Chris Lassing, transfers out because of his diabetic condition, leading toScotty Valensbeing promoted to homicide and becoming Lilly's partner.

characters.name: Sal
characters.description: Salwas the janitor in "Shattered". DetectiveKat Millerflirted with Sal whileNick Verasneaks in deputy commissionerPatrick Doherty’s office to find evidence of him being involved in the 1993 murder of fifteen year oldWanda Johnsonwho was shot to death and dumped only to discover that it was actually his own son,Matt Dohertyand his then best friendRonnie Tavares.
